basic_info.short_form: Imperial School of Agri Business Greater Noida

address.address: Plot No. 30/7 and 8, Knowledge Park III India
address.map_location: Imperial School of Agri Business , Greater Noida

pos_sentences: You will get a scholarship benefit on a merit basis and economic weaker section class where they have certain policies for encouraging students who are having low-level income and will support you in every aspect
Placement are going good with good package and100% placements are done in 2021and 2022.
Good faculty of well experienced from top ranked college from iim irma college
Related to clubs we are getting new things, knowledge, activities and infrastructure is excellent with good wifi.
Hostel life is very good and the atmosphere is amazing.
The best faculties which isab offers are something that inspired me the most to pursue mba here.

100 per cent internship provided by the college, many colleges strive for academic excellence by offering rigorous programs, experienced faculty, and a strong emphasis on research and intellectual development.
Many colleges strive for academic excellence by offering rigorous programs, experienced faculty, and a strong emphasis on research and intellectual development.

You can apply through cat/cmat/isabtest having a good score in 10th,12th and ug give an extra edge to the candidate extracurricular activities also play an important role in the admission process of an mba program
neg_sentences: Sometimes student may feel little pressured because of assignment deadlines and other club/cell works but I think this is what we have come here to learn. To work under pressure, to meet deadlines, to get ready for the cut through competition outside

There are comparatively less holidays. Sometimes you may not get time to visit your homes too which indeed is our struggle for a better future. One should not be scared of that. Take this in a position note and focus on learning and future.

You may meet new people who are not loyal to your friendship. So choose your friend circle wisely and you'll learn a life lesson here like Never trust anybody blindly, keep your eyes and ears open whenever you are around.

courses.course: Master of Business Administration [MBA] (Food & Agri-Business Management)
